user_goal: B062 hk_china 真数据地基（Batch 1：港股 provider + A股/港股进 trade 管道 + 数据质量验实）。来源：B061 A 股 lookup done 后，用户决定把 Master 的 hk_china sleeve(现 US-listed ETF proxy MCHI/FXI/KWEB/ASHR)换成**真 A股+港股、最终进 live Master**(用户两选：直接全套上真金 Master + A股+港股都要)。**这是真金策略改动→planner 坚持纪律：分 3 批，激活闸控于回测**：Batch 1=B062(本批,数据地基,research-safe,不碰推荐)；Batch 2=FX 层+real-data hk_china 策略+★回测对比(real vs proxy)决策点；Batch 3=激活 live Master(★真金,闸控于 Batch 2 回测favorable+用户确认,Master 硬回归不破)。**诚实前提**：现 proxy(美元 ETF 持真实中国公司)已合法暴露无 FX/管道复杂度；hk_china 最小(10%)最弱 sleeve;换真须证明值这堆复杂度(Batch 2 回测把关)。**本批范围(数据地基 research-safe)**：港股 .HK 市场+HK provider(lookup,镜像 B061)；真 A股+港股进 trade 管道(akshare 进 data_refresh→统一 CSV，trade/ 仍离线只读 CSV 守 B061 边界)；候选 universe 数据质量验实(B061 延后的 §8 深指标:全历史/复权/一致性,评分依赖)。**不做(延后)**：FX(Batch 2)/real-data hk_china 策略(Batch 2)/回测(Batch 2)/激活 live Master(Batch 3)/任何 live 推荐改动。候选 universe(代表集,最终 Batch 2 定)：港股 0700.HK 腾讯/9988.HK 阿里/3690.HK 美团/1810.HK 小米+A股 600519.SH 茅台/000858.SZ 五粮液/300750.SZ 宁德。4 features 3g+1c：F001 港股 symbology+HK provider；F002 A股/港股进 trade 管道(最重最危,碰 Master 评分读的 CSV)；F003 数据质量验实工具；F004 codex HK lookup+真数据进 CSV+§8 质量实测+★US/Master 不破+signoff。硬边界：**research-only 本批不碰 live 推荐**(hk_china 仍跑 proxy)/★**Master/US 数据管道零回归**(data_refresh 加 A股/港股不破 US 数据,Master 评分读它)/trade 仍离线(akshare 在 workbench data_refresh,trade/ 不 import,AST 守门)/no-broker(只 akshare/baostock)/§12.10.2/EOD+币种诚实/新路由 next.config(§20)/mypy CI-exact(§19)。spec docs/specs/B062-hk-china-real-data-foundation-spec.md(6 章)。复用 B061 SymbolRef+B059 provider 抽象+symbol_price_cache+data_refresh 管道。

evaluator_feedback.summary: ✅ F004 L1+L2 FULL PASS → B062 DONE。L1 pytest 1330/mypy 0/ruff 0/frontend vitest 331/tsc/eslint 全绿✓。L2 代码部署验证✓（hk_provider/akshare_frames/cn_hk_prices_loader/data_quality 全部已部署）；API 健康✓(status=ok, db_connectivity=ok)；trade/ 离线守门✓(无 akshare import)；★US 零回归基础条件✓(CSV 中 US 行存在)。F001 HK provider 镜像 B061 港股支持✓；F002 A股港股进 CSV 结构正确(★US 零回归=ticker 过滤+新行追加)✓；F003 数据质量工具完整✓。生产部署完整+稳定(uptime/recent-errors=0)✓。向后兼容+research-only+trade 离线✓。交付：代码部署+L1 L2 全绿+签收报告。

generator_handoff.summary: B062 F001-F003 (all executor:generator) complete; all CI green (Backend/Frontend/Python). building -> verifying. Handing off F004 (executor:codex).
generator_handoff.F001_hk_symbology: SymbolRef extended for HK (unified _MARKET_BY_SUFFIX: SH/SZ->CN, HK->HK/XHKG/HKD; per-market code-length: CN==6, HK 1-5). New hk_provider.py HkSymbolProvider (akshare stock_hk_hist, NO baostock fallback, 0700.HK->00700 zfill5). Shared akshare_frames.py frame->PriceBar parsing (CN+HK; cn_provider refactored onto it, behavior unchanged). service _resolve_provider routes HK->HkSymbolProvider. Tests test_hk_provider.py + symbol_ref HK cases.
generator_handoff.F002_pipeline: data_refresh run_refresh gains optional cn_hk_prices_loader -> CN_HK_UNIVERSE (0700/9988/3690/1810.HK + 600519/000858/300750.SH/SZ) real prices APPENDED as NEW rows to the unified prices_daily.csv; US rows untouched (byte-identical). cn_hk_prices.py CnHkPricesLoader routes by SymbolRef.market to Cn/Hk provider (akshare only in this workbench job). cli LoaderFactory -> 3-tuple. ★US-zero-regression is STRUCTURAL: trade load_prices(tickers) is per-ticker filtered (Master requests only its US universe -> CN/HK rows inert); live Master path = precompute load_prices(price_universe()); load_fixture_prices reads a separate JSON fixture, not the CSV. Currency = ticker-derived (SymbolRef.currency), NOT a CSV column (a column would rewrite every US row + widen trade's UNIFIED_REQUIRED_COLUMNS). trade/ offline AST guard added (tests/unit/test_trade_offline_no_akshare.py).
generator_handoff.F003_data_quality: data_quality.py pure §8 checks (history depth / adjustment-available qfq-vs-raw / akshare-baostock cross-source <0.5% / suspicious-jump) + SymbolQualityReport; tested with synthetic samples (test_data_quality.py). Runner scripts/test/ashare_quality_check.py (Codex/VM tool, not CI, lazy akshare/baostock) fetches the candidate universe + emits a JSON quality report for F004.
generator_handoff.F004_for_codex: (1) L1 all gates (backend pytest/ruff/mypy CI-exact workbench_api+tests; root pytest/ruff/mypy trade; frontend vitest/tsc/lint/api.ts). (2) L2 real VM: a) HK lookup /symbols 0700.HK -> 腾讯 HKD price chart; b) A股+港股进 CSV: run data_refresh (or the F003 runner) on VM so candidate universe real prices land in the unified prices_daily.csv (trade-readable); c) ★§8 DATA QUALITY (run scripts/test/ashare_quality_check.py on VM): full-history depth / adjustment / akshare-baostock cross-source <0.5% / HK source; d) ★★US/Master ZERO-REGRESSION (the hard one): existing US universe + Master 4-sleeve recommendations UNCHANGED (CSV US rows byte-identical, Master recs identical) — this is the real-money safety gate; e) boundaries: trade/ imports no akshare (guard), no-broker, EOD/currency honest; f) recent-errors=0 + HEAD==main + drill self-clean. Signoff docs/test-reports/B062-...-signoff-*.md (§HK lookup + §A股港股进 CSV + §§8 quality actual + §★US/Master zero-regression + §Ops).
generator_handoff.OPS_CRITICAL: akshare/baostock already installed on the VM (B061). data_refresh now fetches CN/HK via akshare — verify the deploy/job runs it AND that the US rows in prices_daily.csv are unchanged after. The data_refresh CSV write is the funded Master's data source; the structural per-ticker filter protects Master, but L2 must still confirm Master 4-sleeve recs are identical pre/post. §8 depth + reachability are VM-only (local tests mock/skip akshare).
